Benozzo Gozzoli

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Copy after the fresco of the mock polyptych <i>Virgin and Child with Saints</i>, Benozzo Gozzoli in San Francesco, San Girolamo chapel, Montefalco
by Benozzo Gozzoli
Italy · 1872
←Jan van Goyen Francesco Granacci→
